description_long: This object is a small flag mounted on a slender, vertical pole. The flag features three horizontal stripes: saffron at the top, white in the middle with a blue circular emblem, and green at the bottom, representing the national flag of India. The pole is simple and cylindrical, topped with a small spherical finial. The flag appears to be made of fabric, while the pole is likely metal or plastic. The flag is rectangular and proportionally smaller compared to the length of the pole. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, suitable for display in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or public squares.
description: A small Indian flag with saffron, white, and green stripes and a blue emblem, mounted on a slender vertical pole. The flag and pole are clean and well-maintained.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full flag design with all three colored stripes and the blue emblem clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view showing only the thin edge of the pole, with the flag itself barely visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the flag's stripes and emblem, but with the pole on the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thin edge of the pole, with the flag not visible.
attribute_flag_design: The flag features three horizontal stripes of equal width: saffron at the top, white in the middle with a blue Ashoka Chakra (24-spoke wheel) in the center, and green at the bottom, representing the national flag of India.
